svg.text: Print at 100% scale / “Actual size” — never “fit to page”. Check the calibration square below before trusting anything on this sheet.
1. Measure this square with a ruler.
If it is not, your print was scaled —
re-print at 100% before using this sheet.
Works on A4 and US Letter paper.
2. Ruler (mm) — plug length, plug widths, cord, hand width.
Plug width: press the plug’s side against the stop bar — read it near the wall end, then again near the cord end.
3. Finger-sizing circles — cut out along the dashed lines.
Find the smallest circle your middle finger passes through comfortably.
Your finger width = that circle’s Ø number minus 5. (Example: passes Ø26 → enter 21.)
openscad-plug-puller · measuring template · guide: docs/guides/measuring-guide.md · troubleshooting: docs/guides/fit-troubleshooting.md
